betterquesting:10.desc:8:
For the time being, with regards to my own gluttony for power, restraint is all I can muster.
With regards to the Bees, though, it seems I can finally right this abuse from the Twilight Horde and the Shyre Empire.
It is not an easy task, but the Biome Ritual can finally be brought to use.
There were a few missing puzzle pieces. 
First, the location; the prison itself is in Alkemia, I have to be there to break the chains placed on the Energy Queen.
Second, Alchemy, a form of magic that can act independently from the wards of my enemies, is necessary.
Again, I cannot help but wonder at what Alchemy allowed me to achieve. From simple material transmutation, to Mythic Miners, to the power of Definition. It is not the sole reason why I am here, but it is absolutely the necessary for the journey I have undertaken.
And its gift is something I cannot understand. Because it is indeed a gift, from someone, that much is clear.
Speaking of gift, the Bees are now giving me access to their full power. Literal Power.
